overview: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham is a multi-campus, research-focused private deemed-to-be university in India, known for strong academic standards, industry collaboration, and consistent placement performance across engineering, management, and technology programs.
accreditation: NAAC A++ Grade (Cycle 3) with CGPA 3.7/4.0; NIRF Rank 7 (2024) and 8 (2025) among universities in India.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹1,00,000 – ₹6,00,000 per year depending on branch and scholarship slab (based on AEEE/JEE rank). CSE/AI highest slab up to ₹6 LPA; Mechanical/Civil lowest slab from ₹1 LPA.
Approximately ₹2.20 LPA to ₹6.00 LPA depending on campus.
Approximately ₹1.73 LPA or ₹72,875 – ₹87,500 per semester depending on campus.

placements.companiesVisited: Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Optum, IBM, Oracle, Dell, Ford
placements.internationalOffers: High-value global offers including packages up to ₹80+ LPA

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech admissions via AEEE or JEE Main ranks with scholarship-based fee slabs. 30% of B.Tech seats are reserved for JEE Main candidates. Seat allocation through Centralized Seat Allocation Process (CSAP). MBA via CAT/XAT/other management exams. M.Tech via GATE or internal criteria.
admissions.importantDates: Follows AEEE, JEE, CAT, and GATE admission cycles along with university-specific counseling schedules.
admissions.cutoffNote: B.Tech admission is based on AEEE 2026 or JEE Mains 2026 scores. Top branches like CSE require high percentiles. Home State (HS) candidates may have a lower threshold; Other State (OS) candidates need higher percentile. 5% female-only quota in select branches.

expectedCutoffs.source: Expected cutoffs based on 2024-25 trends (Google AI Mode projection)

campus.area: Multi-campus university (Coimbatore, Amritapuri, Bengaluru, Chennai and others)
campus.specialNote: Hostel and mess charges range from ₹85,000 to ₹1,15,000 per year. One-time caution deposit ₹5,000–₹10,000. Tuition fee waivers (25%–90%) available via entrance rank-based slabs.

scholarships.entranceBased: 25%–90% tuition fee waiver based on AEEE/JEE rank (Slabs 1–3)
scholarships.aicteTFW: Available for students with family income below ₹8 LPA (limited seats)
scholarships.nspScheme: Up to ₹82,000 per annum under NSP (PM-USP) scheme

contact.address: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Amritanagar, Coimbatore – 641112, Tamil Nadu, India
